title: Per-story metrics
description: Sidecar of briefing.json, written by analytical.build_metrics. Read verbatim by the LLM analyze step (numbers must come from this file, not be invented), by analytical.validate_analysis (number reconciliation: every isolation_top entry, every exclusive_vocab claim, n_buckets, n_articles), and by publication.build_index (top_isolation_bucket). Field names here are the cross-stage hand-off contract.

meta_version.description: Methodology pin version this artifact was produced under (added by meta.stamp()).

buckets.description: Sorted bucket names (matches keys of bucket_token_counts and bucket_exclusive_vocab).

pairwise_jaccard.description: All C(n,2) bucket pairs sorted by jaccard descending. (a, b) is a sorted pair (a < b alphabetically).

isolation.description: Mean pairwise Jaccard per bucket, sorted ascending (most-isolated first). Buckets with no pairs are omitted.

bucket_exclusive_vocab.description: Per-bucket terms with doc_freq <= max_doc_freq and count >= min_count (both pinned in meta.METRICS). Empty list for buckets with no exclusive terms.

method.description: Human-readable summary of the tokenisation + threshold rules. Computed from meta.TOKENIZER and meta.METRICS at run time.

isolation_excluded_thin.description: Buckets whose token count fell below meta.METRICS['isolation_min_tokens'] and were therefore excluded from the isolation ranking. Their mean_similarity is still computed (so consumers can audit), but ranking-by-isolation no longer surfaces a 10-token headline-only bucket alongside multi-thousand-token corpora. Added in meta-v8.8.0.

weighted_frame_distribution.description: Population-weighted frame aggregates, computed from the matching analysis JSON via build_metrics --augment-from-analysis after the analyze step has produced frames. Added in meta-v8.8.0; previously this block lived only in the renderer's call-site (the function existed but was unwired into the metrics file).
